title: Login issue in dashboard
description: User is unable to login using Google authentication.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: SSLCommerz gateway is timing out during checkout.

title: Profile picture not updating
description: Users cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Responsive bug in Navbar
description: Navbar menu is overlapping on mobile devices.

title: Email notification delay
description: Forgot password emails are arriving after 10 minutes.

title: Invoice PDF download error
description: Generating invoice PDF results in a 500 server error.

title: Search filter not working
description: Filtering by date range does not return correct results.

title: Dark mode contrast issue
description: Text is not visible in dark mode for some sections.

title: API integration for weather
description: Update the weather API to use the new version 3.0.

title: Session timeout setting
description: Extend session timeout from 30 minutes to 2 hours.

title: Broken link in Footer
description: The Privacy Policy link leads to a 404 page.

title: Slow database queries
description: The ticket list takes too long to load on initial render.

title: New feature: Export CSV
description: Add a button to export all ticket data to CSV format.

title: Broken images in Blog
description: Blog posts are not displaying their featured images.

title: User permission bug
description: Standard users can see the admin settings panel.
